strengths: 15+ years in software engineering across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded, AI-agent infrastructure)
Direct hands-on experience with AI-agent tools and developer tooling (MCP, code generators for agentic workflows)
Proven track record of building and scaling platforms (GISCollective, Green Map) with open-source contributions
concerns: No evidence of entrepreneurial or startup experience within larger organizations
No formal advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in an AI-related field
Limited explicit mention of cloud platform strategy or AI product development leadership

key_factors.factor: Cloud/AI platform strategy and customer advisory experience
Entrepreneurial or startup experience within larger organizations

response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong technical depth in AI-agent infrastructure and platform building (e.g., MCP code generators, GISCollective) with 15+ years of experience, aligning well with the 'AI-powered product development' requirement. However, their role at re:cinq (current) lacks explicit cloud product strategy or customer advisory responsibilities, and no entrepreneurial experience is evident. The absence of a Master's/PhD in AI and limited cloud-specific experience (beyond AWS CDK for pricing optimization) further reduces alignment with the 'AI Strategy' focus.
